accounting.title: Accounting Advisory & Outsourcing
accounting.description: Comprehensive accounting management under IFRS and current Peruvian standards. We turn your accounting into a decision-making tool.
highlights: Accounting Outsourcing for SMEs and Medium Companies

tax.title: Tax Advisory
tax.description: Strategic planning to optimize tax burden and ensure full compliance with SUNAT, avoiding fines and contingencies.

labor.title: Labor Advisory
labor.description: Payroll administration and regulatory compliance before MINTRA and SUNAFIL to ensure risk-free human management.
highlights: Settlement of Social Benefits and CTS
Management of Labor Contracts and Addenda

audit.title: Audits
audit.description: Critical and systematic examination of your finances to ensure transparency before partners, banks, and regulators.
highlights: Evaluation of Internal Controls and Risks

trajectory.subtitle: Our Trajectory
trajectory.title: Over 10 years driving business growth in Peru
trajectory.description: At Exactus, we understand that accounting is not just about recording numbers, it is the foundation for strategic decision-making. Our experience allows us to anticipate tax risks and optimize your company's labor burden.
features: Use of cutting-edge ERP technology for real-time reporting.
trajectory.figcaption: Certified accountants with over 10 years of experience, specialized in tax, labor, and legal consulting for companies seeking sustainable growth and regulatory compliance.
